rows.label: tev024401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Pepper about her company.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Pepper if she has
any interesting news.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Pepper about MEREDES & Co. weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Pepper about Nopon
Commerce Guild weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Pepper about Six Stars weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Pepper about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Have you noticed the couple of office
buildings in the commercial district?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0002
rows.name:
That's where my company is, and where
I work under our president, Wiluug.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0003
rows.name:
To be honest, we wanted to base the
company in the arms manufacturers'
building in the administrative district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0004
rows.name:
But we were told that arms developers
were the preferred tenants, so we
had to abandon that plan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0005
rows.name:
Even though it's OUR company that
handles the sale and distribution
of the weapons made there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0008
rows.name:
These Miralife Cards
are going to be big.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0009
rows.name:
Have you seen them? They have beautiful
illustrations of indigens, the likes
of which I've never laid eyes on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0010
rows.name:
And each one has a description that talks about
the creature in great detail. The information
can be useful, and sometimes even quite funny![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0011
rows.name:
I never saw such exciting
trading cards back on Earth—I
bet they'll be huge here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0012
rows.name:
If you don't want to be left behind, you
should get as many of them as you can![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0013
rows.name:
Hmm? What about me? Heh,
well... I'm going to convince
Wiluug to buy them for me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0015
rows.name:
MEREDES & Co. weapons were
developed based on
reverse-engineered Growth weaponry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0016
rows.name:
They apparently damage their targets
with something called "ether energy."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0017
rows.name:
Natural indigens like beasts and
insects seem to be particularly
vulnerable to ether energy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0018
rows.name:
The company faces some stiff competition,
but I wouldn't be surprised to see
their products start to catch on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0019
rows.name:
Personally I find their designs to be quite
grotesque, but there seem to be plenty of
BLADEs who enjoy that sort of thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0022
rows.name:
The Nopon Commerce Guild specializes
in weapons that attack with flame.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0031
rows.name:
So if you're wielding one
against a foe who's weak to
fire, you've got the upper hand![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0032
rows.name:
Those Nopon make for
pretty tough businessmen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0033
rows.name:
So no matter how high the quality of their
products, people who think they'll make a lot
of money selling them are in for a tough fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0034
rows.name:
If you fall for any of the Nopon negotiating
tricks, you'll end up seeing all your profits
flow straight back to the Nopon Commerce Guild![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0030
rows.name:
Larsian-made katanas are renowned
for their sharp, keen edges.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0035
rows.name:
They tend to be difficult to
wield, but make up for it with
sheer destructive power.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0036
rows.name:
Their products also have a
vaguely eastern design, if
you're into that sort of thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0037
rows.name:
They'll probably sell like
gangbusters among all the BLADEs
who grew up loving ninjas.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0038
rows.name:
Our company would definitely be
interested in helping them bring
more products to the NLA arms market.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0026
rows.name:
Wiluug has resigned from our company,
which makes me the new president.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0027
rows.name:
I've been praised for my foresight,
so I intend to compete by better
predicting marketplace trends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0028
rows.name:
Better yet, I intend to create those
trends and have my company at the center
of the movements that are sweeping NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024401_MSG0029
rows.name:
As to how exactly I'm going to do that...
I'm afraid that's a trade secret![ST:wait ]
